title: heptapleurum merrittii
intro: Heptapleurum merrittii, also known as the Philippine umbrella tree or umbrella fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Heptapleurum merrittii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Heptapleurum merrittii is typically prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction for medicinal use.
